Variables.Name: bUseInverseSquaredFalloff
Variables.Description: Whether to use physically based inverse squared falloff from the light.  If unchecked, the LightExponent distribution will be used instead.

Variables.Name: bAffectsTranslucency
Variables.Description:
Whether lights from this module should affect translucency.
	  Use with caution.  Modules enabling this should only make a few particle lights at most, and the smaller they are, the less they will cost.

Variables.Name: bPreviewLightRadius
Variables.Description:
Will draw wireframe spheres to preview the light radius if enabled.
	  Note: this is intended for previewing and the value will not be saved, it will always revert to disabled.

Variables.Name: SpawnFraction
Variables.Description: Fraction of particles in this emitter to create lights on.

Variables.Name: ColorScaleOverLife
Variables.Description: Scale that is applied to the particle's color to calculate the light's color, and can be setup as a curve over the particle's lifetime.

Variables.Name: BrightnessOverLife
Variables.Description: Brightness scale for the light, which can be setup as a curve over the particle's lifetime.

Variables.Name: RadiusScale
Variables.Description: Scales the particle's radius, to calculate the light's radius.

Variables.Name: LightExponent
Variables.Description: Provides the light's exponent when inverse squared falloff is disabled.

Variables.Name: LightingChannels
Variables.Description:
Channels that this light should affect.
	 Only affect high quality lights
	 These channels only apply to opaque materials, direct lighting, and dynamic lighting and shadowing.

Variables.Name: VolumetricScatteringIntensity
Variables.Description: Intensity of the volumetric scattering from this light.  This scales Intensity and LightColor.

Variables.Name: bHighQualityLights
Variables.Description: Converts the particle lights into high quality lights as if they came from a PointLightComponent.  High quality lights cost significantly more on both CPU and GPU.

Variables.Name: bShadowCastingLights
Variables.Description:
Whether to cast shadows from the particle lights.  Requires High Quality Lights to be enabled.
	  Warning: This can be incredibly expensive on the GPU - use with caution.
